content.en:
The Ancient Blood Snake Clan is very powerful, with one creature of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm and three creatures of the Eighth Blood Transformation Realm, as well as a Boundary Breaking genius of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm.

It is precisely because of this that the strength of the Ancient Blood Snake Clan is extremely powerful, surpassing the Ancient Demon Ape Clan and the White Elephant Clan.

Therefore, the cultivators' forces did not dare to attack the primeval blood snake clan at will.

Of course, the top overlord-level forces can easily destroy the primeval blood snakes, but in the absence of conflict, they will not attack to destroy them.

Therefore, the primeval blood snake clan did not have anything to do.

But Ye Tian wanted to stand up for power, and he fell in love with the treasure land of Jianchen Sea, so he chose the Ancient Blood Snake Clan, and it can only be said that the Ancient Blood Snake Clan was unlucky!

......

Jianchen Sea.

It has now been renamed the Sea of Blood Snakes by the Ancient Blood Serpent Clan.

In the Sea of Blood Snakes, primeval blood snakes roam and play here, and this is simply their paradise.

Some high-level officials are also in meetings, chatting about some big things that have happened recently in the territorial waters.

However, they never expected that they would be targeted.

Wow!

Ye Tian's figure appeared near the Blood Snake Sea, looking at the Blood Snake Sea.

"It is indeed a very good primeval treasure land, although it has been transformed by the primeval blood snake clan, but after occupying it, it will take a while to restore it to an environment suitable for the human race!" Ye Tian said lightly.

Whew!!

An Ancient Blood Snake named Five Blood Transformation Realm appeared and stopped Ye Tian.

"Cultivator, get out of here!"

An Ancient Blood Snake said coldly, as if it was going to do something to him in the next moment.

Compared with the primeval dragon snake clan, the primeval blood snake clan is also a snake clan, and their temperament is much worse.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and these primeval blood snakes exploded and died in an instant.

Ye Tian's move immediately made the Ancient Blood Snake clan notice.

Suddenly, an Ancient Blood Snake powerhouse set out and came out of the Blood Snake Sea.

"Cultivator, dare to kill our ancestors of the Ancient Blood Snake Clan!"

One by one, the Ancient Blood Snake powerhouse said angrily.

However, Ye Tian had a reputation after all, so there were still powerhouses of the Ancient Blood Snake clan who recognized him.

"He's an Ancient-level genius Endless Heavenly Ancestor!!"

An ancient-level genius, and his cultivation has reached the realm of seven blood transformations, this is nine blood transformation-level combat power!

Suddenly, the entire Ancient Blood Snake clan panicked.

And at this time, Ye Tian made a move!

Rumble!!!!

The primeval god and demon fist was punched out, and countless primeval blood snakes were annihilated in an instant.

An Ancient Blood Snake of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm wanted to escape, but it was directly hit by Ye Tian's Ancient Blood Spear through its body, and it was completely wiped out.

Swish!

Ye Tian cast the Taigu Movement, and the speed was too fast.

In an instant, a powerhouse of the Ancient Blood Snake Clan was wiped out by him, and none of the Ancient Blood Snakes could withstand a single blow.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, you're too much!"

The strongest of the Ancient Blood Snake Clan, the Blood Mastiff of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, rushed out of the retreat and tried to intercept Ye Tian.

The strength of the blood mastiff is indeed good, nine times the blood transformation realm, but it is only a relatively powerful nine blood transformation realm, and the gap is relatively large compared to Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian used the Ancient God and Demon Fist to directly blast the blood mastiff away, and caused it to be injured a lot.

Then, with his other hand, he held the primeval blood spear and stabbed into the blood mastiff's body.

The blood mastiff retreated quickly, but Ye Tian's speed was too fast, and after casting the ancient body, his speed beat the blood mastiff.

What is the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Invincible, this is !!

Puff puff puff!!

The body of the blood mastiff was pierced again and again, and it was blown up again and again.

In the blink of an eye, it was already in a state of serious injury and dying.

"Ancient God and Demon Fist, Ancient Blood Spear, and the Third Ancient Technique!!"

The blood mastiff is really stupid, a seven-time blood transformation realm primitive-level genius who has practiced the three ancient techniques, this combat power can be called invincible among the nine blood transformation realm powerhouses, unless it is the kind of top-level existence of the eight blood transformation realm, it is possible to compete with one or two.

Why would such an primeval-level being deal with the primeval blood snake?

They didn't seem to offend Ye Tian!

However, there is no point in questioning at this time.

"All the primeval blood snakes have escaped, and how many can escape is a few!"

The sound of the blood mastiff spread throughout the entire Blood Snake Sea.

When all the primeval blood snakes heard the sound of the blood mastiff, they knew that the primeval blood snake clan could not be defeated and had to escape.

Whew!!!!

One by one, the primeval blood snakes began to flee from all directions, and how many could escape were few.

However.

They can't escape.

Because at this moment, Ye Tian's copy body appeared around the Blood Snake Sea.

This time, he didn't plan to let one of the Ancient Blood Snake Clan escape, if he escaped, wouldn't it add trouble to the Terran in the future!

There may be an ancient blood snake in the outside world, but after knowing the news, it will definitely run away and dare not come back.

In short, let the primeval blood snake clan be wiped out as much as possible.

Puff puff puff!!!

Ye Tian's duplicate body shot out, easily obliterating the primeval blood snakes that had fled in all directions.

Subsequently, these replica bodies slaughtered into the Sea of Blood Snakes.

Seeing this scene, the blood mastiff was completely desperate, he didn't expect Ye Tian to have so many clones, and the Ancient Blood Snake clan was completely hopeless.

Rumble!!!!

Another blow of the Ancient God and Demon Fist hit him, causing him to completely turn into countless fragments, never to recover.

Nine Blood Transformation Realm Creature Blood Mastiffs, Fall!

Soon after, there was no living primeval blood snake left in the Blood Snake Sea.

The waters here have turned blood-red, and the corpses of primeval blood snakes are everywhere.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to clean up the corpses of the primeval blood snake clan, and cleaned up the blood snake sea, restoring this place to an environment suitable for the human race.

At the same time, Ye Tian also announced that from today onwards, the Blood Snake Sea, no, the Sword Dust Sea will be owned by the Terran Race.

......

Universal City.

Ye Tian's news began to spread, shocking countless cultivators.

There was even a Heavenly Ancestor who approached Jianchen Hai and only found Ye Tian and a large number of Ancient Blood Snake corpses, and immediately confirmed that there was no error in the news.

The Endless Heavenly Ancestor destroyed the Ancient Blood Serpent Clan.

In an instant, the entire territorial sea boundary was shocked.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor has destroyed the Ancient Blood Snake Clan!!" When Hayes Heavenly Ancestor heard the news, he immediately felt outrageous.

The Ancient Blood Snake Clan has nine Blood Transformation Realms, how can the Endless Heavenly Ancestor destroy the Ancient Blood Snake?

However, the information received from various sources confirmed that this news was true.

"Could it be that the Endless Heavenly Ancestor has broken through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm?"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was surprised.
